title: How to Use Didi as a Foreign Tourist
metaDescription: Essential tips for foreign tourists to easily use Didi, China's top ride-hailing app. Pay, communicate, and travel safely.

sections.heading: h1
sections.content: Using Didi is a convenient way to get around Chinese cities. Download the app before you arrive. The international version supports English and foreign credit cards, making it the easiest option for tourists.

sections.heading: h2
sections.content: After booking, you can see your driver's details, car model, and license plate number. The app provides real-time tracking and a fare estimate. For communication, you can use the in-app translation feature to send preset messages.

sections.heading: h3
sections.content: Always confirm the car details match the app before getting in. Share your trip status with a friend for safety. In busy areas, the pickup point might be a designated spot; look for signs or ask for help.

keyTakeaways: Download the international version of the app beforehand and link a foreign credit card.
Verify the driver's photo, license plate, and car model before entering the vehicle.
Use the in-app translation tool or have your destination written in Chinese characters to show the driver.
